title: Cute Anime Avatar Base Model
description: A customizable base model for creating anime-style VTuber avatars. Includes blend shapes for facial expressions and VRM compatibility.

title: Fantasy Scene Pack for Warudo
description: A collection of fantasy-themed 3D backgrounds for Warudo, including castle, forest, and magical library scenes.

title: Free VRM Hand Pose Collection
description: 30 hand poses compatible with VRM models. Includes peace signs, pointing, waving, and more.

title: Cel Shader Material Pack
description: Anime-style cel shading materials for Unity and Warudo. Includes toon lighting, outline effects, and color ramp controls.

title: Live2D Cat Ears Accessory
description: Animated cat ears for Live2D models with physics-based movement. Multiple color variants included.

title: VTuber Stream Overlay Pack
description: Complete stream overlay set designed for VTubers. Includes webcam frame, alerts, panels, and scene transitions.

title: VRM Expression Setup Reference Guide
description: A comprehensive visual reference for setting up VRM blend shapes and expressions. Covers all standard expressions plus custom ones.

title: Anime Hair Style Pack (10 Styles)
description: 10 anime-inspired hair models compatible with VRM avatars. Includes physics bones for natural movement.

title: Lo-fi BGM Pack for VTubers
description: 5 royalty-free lo-fi tracks perfect for VTuber streams. Includes waiting screen music and stream BGM.

title: Warudo Motion Capture Setup Guide
description: Step-by-step guide for setting up various motion capture solutions with Warudo, including webcam, iPhone, and full-body tracking.

title: Chibi Avatar Maker Template
description: Customizable chibi-style VTuber model template with modular parts. Great for mascots and stream alerts.

title: Particle Effects Collection for Warudo
description: Beautiful particle effects for Warudo scenes: sparkles, cherry blossoms, rain, snow, and magical auras.

title: VTuber Rigging Checklist & Best Practices
description: A detailed checklist for rigging VTuber models, covering bone structure, weight painting, physics, and expression setup.

title: VTuber Sound Effects Pack
description: 50+ sound effects for VTuber streams: notification sounds, reaction SFX, transition swooshes, and cute pop sounds.

title: Gothic Lolita Outfit for VRM
description: A detailed gothic lolita dress outfit for VRM models. Includes dress, boots, headband, and accessories.

title: Essential OBS Plugins for VTubers
description: Curated list of must-have OBS plugins for VTubers, including virtual camera tools, scene switchers, and audio filters.

title: Pastel Room Backgrounds (5 Rooms)
description: Five cute pastel-colored room backgrounds for VTuber streams. Includes bedroom, kitchen, café, library, and garden.

title: Unity Toon Shader (VTuber Optimized)
description: High-performance toon shader for Unity, optimized for real-time VTuber rendering. Supports outline, rim light, and emission.
